beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: The choice of remaining elective History coursework (to reach a total of 60 credits) is entirely at the student's discretion. This coursework varies, however, depending on whether you have chosen to declare one of the History Thematic Majors . For the Thematic Majors, students must choose 25 elective credits from the approved course lists available by clicking here . Remaining elective credit to reach 60 total History credits is at the student's discretion.
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.note: Credit bucket placeholder extracted from source text.
